basics.name: Simone Manti
basics.label: Machine Learning Researcher
basics.summary: Machine Learning and Computational Physics researcher with strong competencies in Symbolic Regression, High-Performance Computing, and model discovery for complex systems.

work.name: Compular
work.position: Machine Learning for Computational Material Science Intern
highlights: Design, implementation and benchmarking of machine learning pipelines for predicting material and formulation properties.
Main responsible of the machine learning pipelines in support of Compular's computational materials simulation platform.

work.name: Aarhus University
work.position: Research Assistant – Computational Physics and Machine Learning Lab
highlights: Design and implementation of novel data-driven model discovery algorithms to advance the state-of-the-art of Scientific Machine Learning.
Design and development of high-performance Python libraries for Scientific Machine Learning.

work.name: Aarhus University
work.position: PhD Student – Computational Physics and Machine Learning Lab
highlights: Developing Scientific Machine Learning methods combining symbolic regression and discrete mathematics.
Designing and discovering interpretable models for turbulent flows, traffic modeling, and multiscale PDEs.
Leveraging Python, JAX, and HPC workflows to scale experiments and accelerate simulations.
Publishing in prestigious journals and conferences (e.g., Journal of Computational Physics, NeurIPS workshops).
Building and maintaining open-source Python libraries for model discovery and numerical simulation.

work.name: Virginia Tech
highlights: Worked on Data-Driven Reduced-Order Modeling for convection-dominated flows.
Strengthened expertise in physical simulation and interpretable ML with world-renowned collaborators.

volunteer.summary: Reviewing submissions for the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference.
Reviewing submissions for the NeurIPS Workshop on Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences.

volunteer.organization: Philosophical Transactions of the Royal Society A
volunteer.summary: Reviewing manuscripts for Philosophical Transactions of the Royal Society A.

certificates.name: Simulation and Modeling of Natural Processes

publications.name: SR-Traffic: Discovering Macroscopic Traffic Flow Models with Symbolic Regression
publications.summary: Symbolic regression applied to discovering macroscopic traffic flow models directly from data.

publications.name: Symbolic Regression of Data-Driven Reduced Order Model Closures for Under-Resolved, Convection-Dominated Flows
publications.summary: Symbolic regression of ROM closures for high-Reynolds number flow simulations.

publications.name: Discovering Interpretable Physical Models using Symbolic Regression and Discrete Exterior Calculus
publications.summary: Combined symbolic regression with discrete exterior calculus for interpretable physical model discovery.

projects.name: Flex
projects.summary: A flexible, genetic programming-based symbolic regression library built on DEAP and JAX.

projects.name: dctkit
projects.summary: A toolkit for discrete calculus enabling physical modeling on complex geometries.

projects.name: SR-ROM-ConvectionDominatedFlows
projects.summary: Symbolic regression of ROM closures for convection-dominated flows.

projects.name: SR-Traffic
projects.summary: Framework discovering phenomenological laws for traffic flow directly from data.
